description: Saves your staged code changes in the local repository history.

arguments.name: -a
arguments.description: Automatically stage files that have been modified and deleted.

description: Creates a new array populated with the results of calling a provided function on every element.

arguments.name: callbackFn
arguments.description: Function that is called for every element of the array.

explanation: Creates and starts a brand new container instance from a specified image.

arguments.name: -d
arguments.explanation: Detached mode. Runs the container in the background of your terminal so it doesn't block your shell.

arguments.name: -p 8080:80
arguments.explanation: Port mapping. Forwards traffic hitting your local machine's port 8080 directly into the container's port 80.

arguments.name: --name web-server
arguments.explanation: Assigns a custom, memorable name ('web-server') to the running container instead of a random string.

arguments.name: nginx
arguments.explanation: The target base image used to build the container (in this case, the Nginx web server image).
